author: @davidmayhall6567
text: I made copper plating liquid with a old car battrey poured acid into a gallon glass jar and I used a copper rod and a aluminum rod I connected my battrey charger plus to copper and  negative to aluminum rod and I waited until it was blue boiling hot 😮 then let it cool  you can spray it on or sponge it onto steel and it's instant copper.😮 Then a quick spray with some water and baking soda and Bob's your Unkle it's done 😁

author: @paulwedlock9788
text:
Great to stimulate mind's in an energy efficient way :-)
Please include a copy paste link to your shops website in the description section :-)
For other low emission fuel's: Anaerobic digesters use bio waste to produce methane & peat free compost's- This is a step in the right direction & OS technology :-)
https://youtu.be/k2TxAq5A-qc Bottling biogas at ~80psi.
Also look at water Ram pumps & heron fountains :-) they are not technically perpetual motion devices ( free energy is good enough:-)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
